title: Subscription tab: remove support-related feature text

requirements.summary: Ensure support-related feature phrases are not rendered anywhere in the Settings → Subscription UI (including tier features list).
acceptanceCriteria: When viewing Settings → Subscription, none of the strings "Community support", "Priority Support", or "Dedicated Support" appear in the UI.
Subscription tier cards still render normally (features list shows all other entries unchanged), and subscribing flow remains unaffected.
A repository-wide search limited to the Subscription tab rendering path confirms these phrases are not rendered by Subscription UI anymore (e.g., filtered out before display).

file_operations.description: Filter out the feature strings "Community support", "Priority Support", and "Dedicated Support" from the tier features list before rendering (e.g., via a small denylist + normalization/trim), so these phrases never appear in the Subscription tab UI while leaving all other features and the checkout flow unchanged.
